task_completion.description: Locate the target layout in the resource tree
task_completion.visual_evidence: The resource tree panel on the left side of the Nx Witness VMS interface shows the layout named 'Investigation_Board_Alpha' under the user's local layouts.

task_completion.description: Open the target layout to verify its contents
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main viewing area displays a tab titled 'Investigation_Board_Alpha', indicating the layout is open.

task_completion.description: Initiate the promotion of the layout to a Shared Layout
task_completion.visual_evidence: A context menu is open on the layout with an option like 'Save as Shared Layout' or 'Layout Settings' being interacted with, or the layout is actively being dragged to the 'Shared Layouts' node in the resource tree.

task_completion.description: Verify the layout is now a Shared Layout
task_completion.visual_evidence: The layout 'Investigation_Board_Alpha' is clearly visible nested under the 'Shared Layouts' node in the resource tree.

task_completion.description: Verify the layout content remained intact after promotion
task_completion.visual_evidence: The opened 'Investigation_Board_Alpha' layout displays at least 2 distinct camera video panels in the main viewing area, confirming the items were preserved.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Nx Witness VMS graphical user interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Nx Witness VMS desktop client being actively used with mouse clicks or drags.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass the GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows, curl commands, or python scripts are visible being used to interact with the Nx Witness API.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a text editor to modify system files
integrity.visual_evidence: No text editors (like nano, vim, or gedit) are open or being used to modify configuration or database files directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target layout is named 'Investigation_Board_Alpha'. To successfully complete the task, this layout must be moved or saved to the 'Shared Layouts' section in the Nx Witness VMS resource tree (which corresponds to a parentId of '{00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000}'). The layout must retain a minimum of 2 camera items in the viewing area to ensure the content remained intact during the promotion.
